form.name: Notaichean mun rud...
form.location_placeholder: Lorg no cuir àite ùr ris...
form.location_help: Càite san t-seòmar? (m. e. ‘Seilf mullach a’ chaibineit ghorm’)
form.location_public: Chì a h-uile duine an t-àite seo
form.location_private: Is ann dìreach a chì thu seo
form.location_selected: Chan eil àite air a shònrachadh san t-seòmar seo fhathast. Tòisich a’ taipeadh gus fear a chruthachadh.
form.barcode_saved: ✓ Thèid còd-bàr a shàbhaladh <<<__HI_SEP__>> Rud Faicsinneachd <<><__HI_SEP airson a h-uile ball
form.submit_save: Faodaidh tu an còd QR seo a chlò-bhualadh agus a steigeadh air an rud. Bidh sganadh ga ath-stiùireadh gu dìreach chun duilleag seo.
form.submitting: ✓ "{{barcode}}" air a chur ris gu sgiobalta - faodaidh tu deasachadh nas fhaide air adhart
form.invoice_section_help: Glèidh ìomhaigh na fàirdeal, a’ phrìs agus fiosrachadh a’ bharantais an seo gu tèarainte.
form.invoice_section_collapsed: Fosgail an earrann seo ma tha thu airson ìomhaigh na fàirdeal, a’ phrìs agus ceann-latha a’ bharantais a chur ris.
form.invoice_security: Tha am fiosrachadh san earrann seo agus ìomhaigh na fàirdeal air an crioptachadh nuair a thèid an sàbhaladh.
form.warranty_calculation_help: Ma dh'fhàgas tu ceann-latha tòiseachaidh a’ bharantais bàn, thèid ceann-latha na fàirdeal a chleachdadh. Nuair a chuireas tu a-steach an ùine, thèid ceann-latha crìochnachaidh a’ bharantais obrachadh a-mach gu fèin-obrachail.

messages.quick_add_success: ✓ "{{barcode}}" quick added - you can edit later
messages.found_remote: ✓ Fhuaras ann an {{ source}} {{note}}: "{{name}}" <<<__HI_SEP__>> ✓ cha deach a lorg ann an stòr-dàta toraidh. Faodaidh tu rannsachadh air Google.
messages.search_fail: Tha feum air ainm an nì
messages.name_required: Dh'fhàillig an t-àite a chur ris

login.title: Log a-steach
login.subtitle: Stiùirich an clàr dachaigh agad gu sgiobalta
login.terms_beta: BETA: Tha HomeInventory aig ìre deuchainn an-dràsta. Chan eil gealltanas sam bith air a thoirt seachad a thaobh seasmhachd no tèarainteachd an dàta agad.
login.terms_disclaimer: Àicheadh: Le bhith a’ cleachdadh na h-aplacaid seo, tha thu ag aontachadh nach urrainn dhut airgead-dìolaidh sam bith iarraidh airson call dàta a dh’ fhaodadh a bhith ann, cùisean ruigsinneachd, no duilgheadasan teignigeach eile.
login.terms_backup: Data Backup: Tha sinn a’ moladh gu làidir cùl-taic a chumail den fhiosrachadh chudromach agad gu cunbhalach.
login.terms_accept: Le bhith a’ logadh a-steach, thathas a’ meas gun do ghabh thu ris na cumhachan seo.

register.title: Fàilte don Chunntas Dachaigh
register.subtitle: Cruthaich cunntas ùr no gabh a-steach do thaigh a tha ann mu thràth
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 Thèid taigh ùr a chruthachadh agus gheibh thu Iuchrach Taighe air leth. Roinn an iuchair seo leis an teaghlach gus faighinn chun aon chlàr-seilbhe.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Enter the House Key shared with you to join an existing house. Everyone with the key can access the shared inventory.
register.house_key_placeholder: Cuir a-steach iuchair an taighe le 64 caractar
register.support: Cumhachan Cleachdaidh is Àicheadh ​​<<__HI_SEP__>>> Chan eil faclan-faire a’ freagairt ri
register.terms: Feumaidh am facal-faire a bhith co-dhiù 6 caractaran
register.passwords_mismatch: Tha feum air iuchair taighe gus a dhol còmhla ri taigh a tha ann mu thràth <<HI_SEP__>><HI_SEP__ Taigh air a chruthachadh!
register.password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.key_required: House Key is required to join an existing house

key_created.title: 🎉 House Created!
key_created.subtitle: Sàbhail an iuchair gu h-ìosal ann an àite sàbhailte
key_created.warning: Cudromach: Cha tèid an iuchair seo a shealltainn ach aon turas. Roinn e le buill teaghlaich gus am faigh iad cothrom air an aon chlàr-seilbhe.
key_created.button: Shàbhail mi an iuchair, Lean air adhart

email_verification.title: 📧 Dearbhadh Post-d a dhìth
email_verification.message: Chaidh an cunntas a chruthachadh! Feuch an dearbhaich thu do sheòladh puist-d gus logadh a-steach.
email_verification.step_2: Briog air a' phutan <1>"Dearbhaich mo Chunntas"</1> sa phost-d.
email_verification.step_3: Às dèidh an dearbhaidh, <1>faodaidh tu logadh a-steach</1>.
email_verification.spam_note: Thoir sùil air pasgan spama/sgudail mura ruig am post-d.
email_verification.key_note: Cudromach: Chaidh iuchair an taighe agad a chuir sa phost-d cuideachd. Faodaidh tu a roinn le buill teaghlaich.
email_verification.button: Ceart gu leòr, Rach gu Log a-steach

forgot_password.title: Na dhìochuimhnich am facal-faire
forgot_password.subtitle: Tòisich sruth ath-bheothachaidh tèarainte gus faighinn chun chunntas agad a-rithist.
forgot_password.email_success: Ma tha cunntas ann, chaidh ceangal ath-shuidheachadh facal-faire dligheach airson 15 mionaidean a chuir.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Tha post-d à comas air an fhrithealaiche seo. Lean air adhart leis an iuchair ath-bheothachaidh a shàbhail thu nuair a chaidh cunntas a stèidheachadh.
forgot_password.confirm_password_placeholder: Cuir a-steach am facal-faire agad a-rithist

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Cleachd an ceangal tèarainte gus facal-faire ùr a shuidheachadh.
reset_password.missing_token: Tha coltas gu bheil an ceangal ath-shuidheachadh facal-faire neo-choileanta no briste.
reset_password.confirm_password_placeholder: Cuir a-steach am facal-faire agad a-rithist
reset_password.back_to_login: Air ais gu Log a-steach <<<>>Cruthaich an iuchair seo_HISEP__ air a chrìochnachadh, chan eilear den bheachd gu bheil do chunntas sàbhailte airson faighinn seachad air facal-faire ionadail.

recovery_setup.title: Cha tèid an iuchair seo a shealltainn ach aon turas. Sàbhail e ann am manaidsear facal-faire no ann an àite tèarainte eile far-loidhne.
recovery_setup.subtitle: Thèid iuchair ath-bheothachaidh a chruthachadh airson cunntas {{username}}.
recovery_setup.warning: Leis gu bheil post-d à comas, chan urrainn dhut ach am facal-faire agad ath-shuidheachadh leis an iuchair seo san àm ri teachd.

recovery_key_modal.reset_title: Sàbhail an iuchair ath-bheothachaidh ùr agad
recovery_key_modal.settings_title: Sàbhail an iuchair ath-bheothachaidh ùr agad
recovery_key_modal.subtitle: Chan fhaicear an iuchair seo ach aon turas.
recovery_key_modal.warning: Ma chailleas tu an iuchair seo fhad 's a tha post-d à comas, 's dòcha nach urrainn dhut am facal-faire agad fhaighinn air ais. Dèan lethbhreac dheth agus sàbhail e gu sàbhailte.

auth.password_requirements: Cleachd co-dhiù {{ min}} caractaran le litrichean mòra, litrichean beaga, àireamh, agus samhla.

dashboard.subtitle: Sealladh farsaing air an clàr-seilbhe agad

beta_banner.title: Tha HomeInventory aig ìre deuchainn is cur-seachad an-dràsta. Chan eil gealltanas sam bith air a thoirt seachad airson seasmhachd dàta no tèarainteachd. Feuch an cùm thu cùl-taic de dh'fhiosrachadh cudromach.
beta_banner.text: HomeInventory is currently in testing and hobby phase. No guarantee is given for data persistence or security. Please keep backups of important information.

my_houses.title: My Houses
my_houses.no_house: You are not a member of any house yet
my_houses.info: 💡 You can be a member of multiple houses and switch between them. Each house maintains a separate inventory.

house_info.title: Active House Key
house_info.share_info: 💡 Users you share this key with can access your inventory by using the "Join House" option during registration.
house_info.invite_desc: Share your house key to let family members access the same inventory. Each member logs in with their own account but accesses the same data.

security.title: Security
security.recovery_key_desc: You can generate a new key for local password recovery.
security.recovery_key_missing: No recovery key is visible for this account yet.
security.recovery_key_unavailable: The current recovery key cannot be displayed. Regenerate it if needed.
security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Confirm your current password to continue. The new key will be shown only once.

join_house.title: Join House
join_house.key_help: Enter the key you received from your family member

create_house.title: Create New House
create_house.name_help: If left empty, will be named "My New House"
create_house.info: ℹ️ Default categories and rooms will be created for the new house. You can edit them later.

username.title: Change Username
username.help: 3-30 characters, letters, numbers, underscore and dash only

rooms.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this room?

users.confirm_ban: Are you sure you want to {{status}} this user?
users.confirm_delete_1: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"?
users.confirm_delete_2: ⚠️ WARNING: This will PERMANENTLY delete ALL data (inventories, rooms, categories) for user "{{username}}"!
users.confirm_delete_3: 🚨 FINAL WARNING: Account "{{username}}" and all data will be IRREVERSIBLY deleted. Do you want to continue?

hero.description: Digitize your home inventory. Categorize items, invite family, and access from anywhere. Modern, secure, and easy to use.

features.title: Why <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: All features to simplify home management in one platform

categorize.title: Categorize Items
categorize.desc: Organize all items by room and category, find what you need in seconds.

family.title: Invite Family with House Key
family.desc: Invite family members with your unique house key, manage inventory together.

access.title: Access from Anywhere
access.desc: At home, at work, or on vacation - securely access your inventory from anywhere.

barcode.title: Quick Add with Barcode
barcode.desc: Scan product barcodes, details are filled automatically.

security.title: Secure and Private
security.desc: Your data is encrypted and protected with KVKK compliant infrastructure.

backup.title: Backup & Export
backup.desc: Backup your inventory in JSON format, restore whenever you want.

cta_bottom.title: Start Using Now!
cta_bottom.description: Create a free account and digitize your home inventory. Registration takes only a few seconds.

footer.desc: The easy and secure platform to digitize your home inventory.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Demo view: no real user data is displayed.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.content: Here you can add and list your items. Track all home items in one place!

house_key.title: House Key
house_key.content: This is your house key, use it to invite others. Add family members to your house!

categories.title: Categories
categories.content: Organize by categorizing your items. Electronics, furniture, kitchen, and more!

google_house_select.title: Welcome!
google_house_select.subtitle: You logged in with Google. Now select a house.
google_house_select.welcome_options: What would you like to do?
google_house_select.house_name_hint: If left empty, it will be named "My Home"
google_house_select.house_key_hint: Enter the 64-character key received from a family member

scanner.found_local_msg: This barcode is already in your inventory.
scanner.not_found_db: This barcode was not found in databases.

scanner.invalid_qr: This QR code is not for this app.
scanner.not_found: Product not found. Try a different barcode.

item_qr.hint_mobile: 📱 Scan this QR code with your phone to access the item quickly
item_qr.usage_desc: Print the QR code and stick it on the item. Scan with your phone to access this page instantly!

pending.title: Waiting for house owner approval

no_house.description: Create a new house or send a join request to an existing one.

create.title: Create a New House
create.description: Start your own home inventory and continue right away.
create.name_placeholder: e.g. My Home, Summer House, Storage

join.title: Send a Join Request
join.description: Enter a house key and send the request directly to the house owner.

verification.subject: 🏠 HomeInventory - 📧 Email Verification Required
verification.headerSubtitle: Cruthaich cunntas ùr no gabh a-steach do thaigh a tha ann mu thràth
verification.intro: Account created! Please verify your email address to login.
verification.warningBody: Check spam/junk folder if email doesn't arrive.
verification.houseKeyNote: Important: Your house key was also sent in the email. You can share it with family members.
features: 💡 You can be a member of multiple houses and switch between them. Each house maintains a separate inventory.
verification.fallback: The password reset link looks incomplete or broken.

features: 💡 You can be a member of multiple houses and switch between them. Each house maintains a separate inventory.

houseKick.bodyLine2: Create a new house or send a join request to an existing one.

passwordReset.subject: 🔐 Reset Password
passwordReset.intro: Start a secure recovery flow to access your account again.
passwordReset.warningBody: If an account exists, a password reset link valid for 15 minutes has been sent.
passwordReset.fallback: The password reset link looks incomplete or broken.

vault.title: Seilear Pearsanta
vault.subtitle: Raon pearsanta a thèid a dhì-chrioptachadh a-mhàin sa bhrabhsair agus nach gabh a leughadh leis an fhrithealaiche mar theacsa shoilleir.
vault.setup_description: Tha iuchair an t-seileir ga cruthachadh sa bhrabhsair. Chan eil an frithealaiche a’ stòradh ach an iuchair phaisgte agus clàran crioptaichte.
vault.setup_warning: Ma chailleas tu an dà chuid abairt-fhaire an t-seileir agus an iuchair ath-bheothachaidh, chan urrainnear an dàta a thoirt air ais.
vault.passphrase_placeholder: Tagh abairt-fhaire làidir le co-dhiù 12 caractar
vault.protection_item_1: Tha ainm an nì, tuairisgeul, còd-bàr, prìs, ceann-latha agus raointean barantais air an crioptachadh sa bhrabhsair.
vault.protection_item_2: Chan fhaic an frithealaiche ach an soitheach crioptaichte, àireamh nan nithean agus na stampaichean-ama.
vault.protection_item_3: Tha a’ chiad sgaoileadh gu h-aon-ghnothach pearsanta agus stèidhichte air teacsa; feumaidh roinneadh agus meadhanan sruth tèarainte fa leth.
vault.unlock_description: Faodaidh tu an seilear fhosgladh leis an abairt-fhaire agad no leis an iuchair ath-bheothachaidh a shàbhail thu roimhe.
vault.unlock_passphrase_placeholder: Cuir a-steach abairt-fhaire an t-seileir agad
vault.security_note_1: Chan eil iuchair an t-seileir beò ach ann an cuimhne a’ bhrabhsair. Thèid a glanadh nuair a dh’fhàgas tu an duilleag no nuair a ghlasas tu an seilear.
vault.security_note_2: Ma dhìochuimhnicheas tu an abairt-fhaire, faodaidh tu an iuchair ath-bheothachaidh a chleachdadh. Ma thèid an dà chuid air chall, bidh an susbaint do-ruigsinneach gu buan.
vault.recovery_ready_description: Cha nochd sinn an iuchair seo ach aon turas. Cùm i ann an àite sàbhailte.
vault.recovery_visible_once: Cha tèid an iuchair seo a shealltainn a-rithist nas fhaide air adhart.
vault.recovery_file_warning: Ma chailleas tu an dà chuid an iuchair seo agus abairt-fhaire an t-seileir agad, chan urrainnear an seilear fhaighinn air ais.
vault.record_form_subtitle: Tha seo a’ leantainn sruth an nì àbhaisteach nas dlùithe, ach chan fhàg teacsa soilleir am brabhsair idir.
vault.barcode_privacy_hint: Cha tèid còdan-bàr an t-seileir a choimhead suas gu fèin-obrachail air seirbheisean taobh a-muigh; chan eil teacsa a’ chòd-bhàir air a stòradh ach mar dhàta crioptaichte.
vault.media_note: Tha dealbhan, sganadh còd-bàr agus lorg toraidh taobh a-muigh air an cur dheth gu h-aon-ghnothach anns a’ chiad shruth seileir seo. Feumaidh iad pìob-loidhne meadhanan agus prìobhaideachd crioptaichte fa leth.
vault.empty_description: Tòisich le bhith a’ cur ris a’ chiad chlàr seileir pearsanta agad.
vault.empty_filter_title: Chan eil clàran sam bith a’ freagairt air a’ chriathrag làithreach
vault.empty_filter_description: Feuch lorg eadar-dhealaichte no atharraich na criathragan.
vault.delete_confirm: A bheil thu cinnteach gu bheil thu airson an clàr seileir seo a sguabadh às?

messages.passphrase_mismatch: Chan eil abairtean-fhaire an t-seileir a’ freagairt.
messages.setup_failed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an seilear pearsanta a chruthachadh.
messages.unlock_failed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an seilear fhosgladh. Thoir sùil air an fhiosrachadh a chuir thu a-steach.
messages.save_failed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn clàr an t-seileir a shàbhaladh.
messages.delete_failed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn clàr an t-seileir a sguabadh às.
messages.decrypt_failed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn susbaint an t-seileir a dhì-chrioptachadh.
messages.name_required: Tha ainm nì riatanach airson clàr seileir.
messages.options_failed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn roghainnean roinne is seòmair a luchdachadh.
